title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Lodha Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Lodha Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group:
Lodha Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group!
